ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the user's profile (e.g., incomplete, partial, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the user (e.g., thin, average, athletic) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Dietary preferences of the user (e.g., vegetarian, vegan) */,
  "drinks" TEXT /* Drinking habits of the user (e.g., socially, often) */,
  "drugs" TEXT /* Substance use habits of the user (e.g., never, sometimes) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the user (e.g., high school, college) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the user (e.g., white, asian, black) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in inches */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the user */,
  "looking_for" TEXT /* What the user is looking for in a partner */,
  "interested_in" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "hobbies" TEXT /* Hobbies of the user */,
  "favorite_books" TEXT /* Favorite books of the user */,
  "favorite_movies" TEXT /* Favorite movies of the user */,
  "favorite_music" TEXT /* Favorite music of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_jobs" (
  "user_job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company where the user works */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's employment */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_jobs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the user's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the user's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_locations" (
  "user_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user location */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "last_online" TEXT /* Last online time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_locations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offsprings" (
  "offspring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offspring */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "has_kids" INTEGER /* Whether the user has kids */,
  "wants_kids" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants kids */,
  "number_of_kids" INTEGER /* Number of kids the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offspring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offsprings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orientations" (
  "orientation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orientation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the user (e.g., straight, gay, bi) */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Preference of the user (e.g., men, women, both) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orientation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orientations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pets" (
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "pet_type" TEXT /* Type of pet (e.g., dog, cat) */,
  "pet_name" TEXT /* Name of the pet */,
  "pet_description" TEXT /* Description of the pet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "religions" (
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each religion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religion of the user (e.g., Christianity, Islam) */,
  "seriousness" TEXT /* How serious the user is about their religion (e.g., very serious, not serious) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("religion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_religions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signs" (
  "sign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "sign" TEXT /* Sign of the user (e.g., Gemini, Leo) */,
  "sun_sign" TEXT /* Sun sign of the user */,
  "moon_sign" TEXT /* Moon sign of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smokes" (
  "smoke_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoke */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "smokes" INTEGER /* Whether the user smokes */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the user's smoking (e.g., daily, occasionally) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoke_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smokes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaks" (
  "speak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the user (e.g., English, Spanish) */,
  "fluency" TEXT /* Fluency level of the user in the language (e.g., fluent, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., single, in a relationship) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statuses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "essays" (
  "essay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each essay */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "essay" TEXT /* Essay written by the user */,
  "essay_type" TEXT /* Type of essay (e.g., introduction, interests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("essay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_essays_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sender's user account */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the receiver's user account */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocklists" (
  "blocklist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blocklist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blocked user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blocklist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocklists_blocked_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocked_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocklists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
